## Summary

**Optimal transport outperforms mean-pooling on protein property prediction** [@naderializadeh2024]. This uses a learnable aggregation function to convert a variable-length vector generated by a [[tags/protein-language-models|protein language model]] into a fixed-length vector used for inference.
